title: BSÍ Bus Terminal
setting: The main bus terminal in Reykjavík. 08:45. You need to ask about bus routes to the Golden Circle.

npc.name: Anna
npc.personality: friendly bus station attendant, patient with tourists. Speaks clearly.
npc.initialLine: Góðan daginn. Get ég hjálpað þér?
npc.initialTranslation: Good day. Can I help you?

debriefRu: Þú ert ferðamaður á Íslandi. Þú ert í BSÍ og þarft að komast á Gullna hringinn. Notaðu einfaldar setningar eins og 'Afsakið' og 'Takk'.
debriefEn: You are a tourist in Iceland. You are at the BSÍ bus terminal and need to get to the Golden Circle. Use simple phrases like 'Excuse me' and 'Thank you'.

turns.instruction: Excuse yourself and ask about the next bus to the Golden Circle.

prompt.ru: Afsakið, hvenær er næsta rúta á Gullna hringinn?
prompt.phonetic: AV-sa-kith, KVEH-nigh-er er NIGH-sta ROO-ta ow GWOTL-na HRING-kitn?
prompt.en: Excuse me, when is the next bus to the Golden Circle?

turns.instruction: Ask how long the trip takes.

prompt.en: How long does the trip take?

turns.instruction: Ask how much a ticket costs.

prompt.en: How much does a ticket cost?

turns.instruction: Say you want to buy a round-trip ticket.

prompt.ru: Ég ætla að kaupa miða fram og til baka.
prompt.phonetic: Yeg AY-tla ath KOY-pa MIH-tha fram ok til BAH-ka.
prompt.en: I'm going to buy a ticket there and back.

turns.instruction: Thank them and ask what time the bus returns.

prompt.ru: Takk fyrir! Hvenær kemur rútan til baka?
prompt.phonetic: Tahk FIR-ir! KVEH-nigh-er KEH-mur ROO-tan til BAH-ka?
prompt.en: Thank you! When does the bus come back?
